Lilith is the mitochondrial lilith (of all eukaryotes)

This is to say she is the ancestress of the Rikketsiales and is a parasite

== Cultural appropriation concerns ==
I am not gonna change it over cultural appropriation concerns. Mitochondrial Eve and Mitochondrial Lilith are too good an idea and historically one of the most popular ones
[[Category:First 250 notes]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
